# The Found Sock Laundromat

> Locally owned self-service laundromat in Brighton, Massachusetts — open since 2015. Brand-new card-operated washers (20–45 lb) and dryers, no quarters, Apple Pay and Google Pay accepted, free Wi-Fi, and a mobile app that lets customers start machines from their phone. The closest card-operated laundromat to Allston, Brighton Center, Cleveland Circle, Oak Square, and Brookline Village; popular with the Boston College and Boston University student communities for late hours and family-size washers.

## Quick facts

- **Business name:** The Found Sock Laundromat
- **Address:** 76 Washington Street, Brighton, MA 02135 (United States)
- **Hours:** 6 AM to 11 PM, every day of the year (including all holidays)
- **Founded:** 2015
- **Service type:** Self-service only (no wash-and-fold or drop-off — customers wash their own clothes)
- **Payment:** Credit card, debit card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, or loyalty card (loadable with cash or credit at our in-store touchscreen kiosk or from the app)
- **Phone:** No public phone; all customer contact via the report-an-issue form on the website (lands as a tracked ticket with a few-hour response time)
- **Contact form:** https://www.foundsocklaundromat.com/report-issue/
- **Currency:** USD

## What's on site

- **Machines:** 20 lb Wascomat, 30 lb LG, 35 lb LG, and 45 lb Electrolux front-load washers; 30 lb Wascomat dryers
- **Washer prices:** $6.00 (20 lb), $6.25 (30 lb), $6.50 (35 lb), $7.75 (45 lb)
- **Dryer pricing:** $0.50 per 4-minute interval (most loads need 24–36 minutes)
- **Loyalty card:** $1.50 one-time card fee, $1 minimum load, no maximum, **never expires**, earns **10% cashback on every wash automatically**
- **Mobile app:** Free FasCard app by Card Concepts Inc. (iOS + Android) — scan a machine's QR to start, see real-time availability, get push notifications when cycles finish, reload loyalty card balance from anywhere
- **Amenities:** Free Wi-Fi, comfortable seating area, TV, stainless steel folding tables, on-site detergent vending, single-load detergent packs at the kiosk

## Service area

The Found Sock Laundromat serves the following Boston neighborhoods (foot/transit/drive distance shown):

- **Allston** — ~6 minute walk from Allston center
- **Brighton Center** — ~4 minute walk
- **Cleveland Circle** — ~7 minute walk; popular with BC students
- **Oak Square** — ~5 minute drive
- **Brookline Village** — ~8 minute drive
- **Boston College (BC)** community — late hours work for student schedules
- **Boston University (BU)** community — close enough for off-campus students

## Featured guides (blog)

- [How to wash a comforter at a laundromat (and why your home washer can't)](https://www.foundsocklaundromat.com/blog/how-to-wash-a-comforter/) — when home washers aren't big enough; matching comforter size to machine size; drying without clumping
- [How long does laundry actually take at a laundromat?](https://www.foundsocklaundromat.com/blog/how-long-does-laundry-take/) — full timeline from walking in to walking out, with tricks to halve the time
- [What to bring on your first laundromat visit](https://www.foundsocklaundromat.com/blog/first-laundromat-visit-checklist/) — a short checklist for newcomers
- [Cold, warm, or hot? A simple wash temperature guide](https://www.foundsocklaundromat.com/blog/wash-temperature-guide/) — when each temperature is right; why cold is now the default
- [How to wash a down jacket without ruining it](https://www.foundsocklaundromat.com/blog/how-to-wash-a-down-jacket/) — detergent + drying rules for Patagonia/North Face/Uniqlo jackets
- [The biggest laundry mistake: too much detergent](https://www.foundsocklaundromat.com/blog/too-much-detergent/) — how to dial in the right amount; why excess detergent makes clothes dingier
- [How to wash a weighted blanket at a laundromat](https://www.foundsocklaundromat.com/blog/how-to-wash-a-weighted-blanket/) — sizing the washer to the blanket weight; gentle drying
- [Laundromat etiquette: 7 things regulars wish first-timers knew](https://www.foundsocklaundromat.com/blog/laundromat-etiquette/) — the unwritten rules
- [How often should you wash sheets, towels, and comforters?](https://www.foundsocklaundromat.com/blog/how-often-to-wash-bedding/) — honest frequencies by item type
- [Best time to visit (avoiding the Brighton rush)](https://www.foundsocklaundromat.com/blog/best-time-to-visit/) — full weekly traffic table
- [Why your towels feel scratchy (and 4 ways to fix them)](https://www.foundsocklaundromat.com/blog/scratchy-towels-fix/) — vinegar reset, strip-wash, habit changes
- [How to wash workout clothes that smell](https://www.foundsocklaundromat.com/blog/how-to-wash-workout-clothes/) — vinegar pre-soak routine for polyester/nylon/spandex
- [How to remove tough stains from clothes](https://www.foundsocklaundromat.com/blog/how-to-remove-tough-stains/) — per-stain field guide (red wine, grease, ink, grass, blood, sweat)
- [The hidden benefits of a laundromat loyalty card](https://www.foundsocklaundromat.com/blog/loyalty-card-benefits/) — math on cashback and reloading from the app
- [How to use a coinless laundromat (no quarters, no app required)](https://www.foundsocklaundromat.com/blog/how-to-use-coinless-payment/) — step-by-step for first-timers

## Brand and image

- Brand colors: navy blue (#2864A0 / deep #1A4677) and red (#C80014)
